news.title: I have no kids. Will I cause family drama by leaving different amounts to my nieces and nephews?

news.title: Why the stock market’s red-hot momentum trade might be headed for a violent unwind this month
news.summary: Momentum trades tend to struggle in July — but this year may be particularly volatile, says one strategist. The rumblings have already started.

news.title: ‘We were stunned’: My daughter, 39, said her mother-in-law gives her more money than we do. Should I confront her?
news.summary: “She thanked us for the $100 birthday gift and then announced that her mother-in-law had sent her $400.”

news.title: ‘She wants him gone’: My friend took in a homeless man as a caretaker. After 10 years, how can she evict him?
news.summary: “He lived rent-free, helping her with health-related issues and other tasks.”
